name: PT Arthavest Tbk
summary: PT Arthavest Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the hospitality business in Central Jakarta. The company owns and operates Redtop, a 4-star business hotel with 390-suite rooms. Its Redtop hotel offers convention and banquet, meeting rooms, and business center, as well as sports center and spa. The company also provides information technology and payment system services. The company was formerly known as PT Artha Securities Tbk. PT Arthavest Tbk was founded in 1990 and is based in Central Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Arthavest Tbk is a subsidiary of Lucas SH CN.
